channel.title: +kalai-quarrel on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +kalai-quarrel on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Compromises
item.description:
bengaLUru kRShNa temple

The temple had issues once - mysore raja mediated and made it a temple of both kalais. Remarkably meticulous. Quite unlike modern India we know.

  • There will always be a VK and TK archaka, and urdhwapundras marked in the temple (vigrahas or sculptures or walls) 50-50
  • If one left dwarapalaka is VK the next prAkAra left dwarapalaka will be TK.
  • for azhwars half have VK utsava TK moolavar and rest have VK moolavar and TK utsava
  • even elephants are painted 50-50 very meticulously

Kn Intro
aruLpADu including deshika & mAmuni

item.title: TN records check
item.description:
tiruvallur

“Sri.U.Ve.P.B.Annangarachariar Swamy of Kancheepuram states in one of his issues of “Ramanujan” a Monthly Journal that in 1835 AD, one Ranganatha Satakopa Jeeyar, for the first time recited “Ramanuja Dayapathram” a Vadakalai Thanian at Trivallore. For such recitation the Jeeyar and his agents were fined by the Dy.Collector H.Richardson on 25.8.1835.”

Source: TW

kAnchI varadarAja

Source: TW

1770 shrIrAma iyengar

EXHIBIT B. (dated १६-१०-१७७०)

Agreement executed on the १६th Arpisi of the year Vikriti (॥॥॥॥॥॥) to Chakravarti Venkatachariar, Venkatachariar son Prathivatibayankaram Rangachariar, Prabakaram Thirumalachariar, and Pullavagam Venkatachariar and other Thennacharyars by Adyapagam Sreeramaiyengar to wit:-
